gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students, who clutch resumes inside branded folders, are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; meanwhile, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while clutching resumes inside branded folders; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos, while students, who clutch resumes inside branded folders, are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students are lining up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, where healthcare providers are showcasing community outreach photos; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.
